summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Points Economy and Admin-Provisioned Accounts features. All backend APIs (24/24 tests) and frontend UI flows tested successfully. Both new features are fully functional.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/auth/register returns 410 (closed signup)
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/signup-request creates valid signup requests
BACKEND: Duplicate/invalid signup requests return correct error codes (409, 422)
BACKEND: Admin login and GET /api/admin/signup-requests?status=PENDING works
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/signup-requests/{id}/approve creates user with username/password
BACKEND: Duplicate username approval returns 409
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/signup-requests/{id}/reject works
BACKEND: Login with username (lowercase and uppercase) works
BACKEND: Legacy email login still works
BACKEND: GET /api/chips/balance includes points field
BACKEND: POST /api/chips/convert with CHIPS_TO_POINTS (500) works
BACKEND: POST /api/chips/convert with POINTS_TO_CHIPS (500) works
BACKEND: Conversion with amount < 500 returns 422
BACKEND: Conversion with insufficient balance returns 400
BACKEND: GET /api/points/transactions lists transactions
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/users/{id}/points adds points
BACKEND: Admin points deduction with insufficient balance returns 400
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/stats includes pending_signups count
FRONTEND: /register shows signup request form with all fields (fullname, email, dob, phone)
FRONTEND: Signup request submission shows success card with 'Login ID and password' message
FRONTEND: Admin > Signups page lists pending requests
FRONTEND: Admin can approve request - dialog shows with prefilled username/password
FRONTEND: Password generator button works
FRONTEND: After approval, credentials card displays Login ID and password
FRONTEND: Login page shows 'Login ID or Email' label
FRONTEND: Login with username (qa_tester_01) works
FRONTEND: /chips page shows points card with points balance
FRONTEND: Conversion UI: 'Sell chips -> points' and 'Points -> chips' buttons work
FRONTEND: Converting 500 chips to points updates both balances correctly
FRONTEND: Converting 500 points back to chips restores balances
FRONTEND: /profile shows points balance
FRONTEND: /profile shows @username for provisioned users
FRONTEND: Admin > Users table shows Points column
FRONTEND: Clicking points value opens adjustment dialog
FRONTEND: Admin can adjust points with delta and note
FRONTEND: Points adjustment shows success toast with new balance
